name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ /\ state[i] = "idle"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
    \/ /\ state[i] = "trying"
       /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
    \/ /\ state[i] = "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N, Participants
VARIABLES coordinatorState, messages, participantStates


TypeOK == Participants \subseteq 1..N /\ Participants \in SUBSET 1..N

vars == <<coordinatorState, participantStates, messages>>

Init == /\ coordinatorState = "Init"
        /\ participantStates = [p \in Participants |-> "Idle"]
        /\ messages = <<>>

PrepareMsg == "Prepare"
VoteYesMsg == "VoteYes"
VoteNoMsg == "VoteNo"
CommitMsg == "Commit"
AbortMsg == "Abort"

Send(msg) == messages' = Append(messages, msg)
Receive(msg) == messages' = Tail(messages)

CoordinatorSendPrepare == /\ coordinatorState = "Init"
                          /\ Send(PrepareMsg)
                          /\ coordinatorState' = "Prepared"

CoordinatorReceiveVoteYes == /\ coordinatorState = "Prepared"
                            /\ messages[1] = VoteYesMsg
                            /\ Receive(VoteYesMsg)
                            /\ coordinatorState' = "Commit"

CoordinatorReceiveVoteNo == /\ coordinatorState = "Prepared"
                           /\ messages[1] = VoteNoMsg
                           /\ Receive(VoteNoMsg)
                           /\ coordinatorState' = "Abort"

CoordinatorSendCommit == /\ coordinatorState = "Commit"
                         /\ Send(CommitMsg)
                         /\ UNCHANGED coordinatorState

CoordinatorSendAbort == /\ coordinatorState = "Abort"
                        /\ Send(AbortMsg)
                        /\ UNCHANGED coordinatorState

ParticipantReceivePrepare(p) == /\ participantStates[p] = "Idle"
                                /\ messages[1] = PrepareMsg
                                /\ Receive(PrepareMsg)
                                /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "Prepared"]
                                /\ UNCHANGED coordinatorState

ParticipantSendVoteYes(p) == /\ participantStates[p] = "Prepared"
                            /\ Send(VoteYesMsg)
                            /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "VotedYes"]
                            /\ UNCHANGED coordinatorState

ParticipantSendVoteNo(p) == /\ participantStates[p] = "Prepared"
                           /\ Send(VoteNoMsg)
                           /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "VotedNo"]
                           /\ UNCHANGED coordinatorState

ParticipantReceiveCommit(p) == /\ participantStates[p] = "Committed"
                               /\ messages[1] = CommitMsg
                               /\ Receive(CommitMsg)
                               /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "Committed"]
                               /\ UNCHANGED coordinatorState

ParticipantReceiveAbort(p) == /\ participantStates[p] = "Aborted"
                             /\ messages[1] = AbortMsg
                             /\ Receive(AbortMsg)
                             /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]
                             /\ UNCHANGED coordinatorState

Next == \/ CoordinatorSendPrepare
        \/ CoordinatorReceiveVoteYes
        \/ CoordinatorReceiveVoteNo
        \/ CoordinatorSendCommit
        \/ CoordinatorSendAbort
        \/ \E p \in Participants: ParticipantReceivePrepare(p)
        \/ \E p \in Participants: ParticipantSendVoteYes(p)
        \/ \E p \in Participants: ParticipantSendVoteNo(p)
        \/ \E p \in Participants: ParticipantReceiveCommit(p)
        \/ \E p \in Participants: ParticipantReceiveAbort(p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* forks[i] = 0 if fork i is free, 1 if held by philosopher i *)
TypeOK == forks \in {0,1}^N /\ state \in {"thinking","hungry","eating"}^N

Init == forks = <<0: i \in 0..N-1>> /\ state = <<"thinking": i \in 0..N-1>>

Left(i) == (i + N - 1) % N
Right(i) == (i + 1) % N

PickUp(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "hungry"
  /\ forks[i] = 0
  /\ forks[Left(i)] = 0
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 1, ![Left(i)] = 1]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

PutDown(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "eating"
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![Left(i)] = 0]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Next == \E i \in 0..N-1: PickUp(i) \/ PutDown(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

(* Variables *)
VARIABLES num, flag

(* Type constraints *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

(* Initialization: all numbers zero, all flags false *)
Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Helper: max number among all processes *)
maxNum == Max(Seq(num))

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ (* Process i is choosing a number *)
       /\ flag[i] = FALSE
       /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
       /\ UNCHANGED num
    \/ (* Process i is choosing a number *)
       /\ flag[i] = TRUE
       /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum + 1]
       /\ UNCHANGED flag
    \/ (* Process i is leaving the critical section *)
       /\ flag[i] = TRUE
       /\ num[i] = 0
       /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
       /\ UNCHANGED num

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(0..K)
    /\ head \in 0..K
    /\ tail \in 0..K
    /\ size \in 0..K

Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ size = 0

Producer == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  \* Enqueue 1 for simplicity
    /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % (K + 1)
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ head' = head

Consumer == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)  \* Dequeue
    /\ head' = (head + 1) % (K + 1)
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ tail' = tail

Next == 
    \/ Producer
    \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N
VARIABLES currentTerm, state, votedFor


(* State constants *)
Follower == 0
Candidate == 1
Leader == 2

(* Type constraints *)
TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in 0..N
          /\ votedFor \in 0..N
          /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = 0
        /\ state = Follower

(* Transition: become candidate *)
BecomeCandidate == /\ state = Follower
                  /\ state' = Candidate
                  /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
                  /\ votedFor' = 1
                  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, state>>

(* Transition: vote for candidate *)
VoteForCandidate == /\ state = Follower
                    /\ votedFor' = 1
                    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, state>>

(* Transition: become leader *)
BecomeLeader == /\ state = Candidate
                /\ state' = Leader
                /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

(* Transition: stay in current state *)
Stay == /\ state' = state
        /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E action \in {BecomeCandidate, VoteForCandidate, BecomeLeader, Stay} :
          action

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

TypeOK == readers \in 0..N /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

Init == readers = 0 /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next ==
  \/ /\ readers' = readers + 1 /\ writer_active' = writer_active
     /\ readers < N
  \/ /\ readers' = readers - 1 /\ writer_active' = writer_active
     /\ readers > 0
  \/ /\ readers' = readers /\ writer_active' = TRUE
     /\ readers = 0
  \/ /\ readers' = readers /\ writer_active' = FALSE
     /\ writer_active

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in 1..10

CHANNELS == {1..N} \ {1}  \cup {1..N} \ {N}

VARIABLES state, channel, marker

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"active", "recorded"}]
          /\ channel \in [CHANNELS -> Seq(NIL)]

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "active"]
        /\ channel = [c \in CHANNELS |-> <<>>]

Next == \/ /\ state[1] = "active"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![1] = "recorded"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<channel, marker>>
   \/ /\ state[2] = "active"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![2] = "recorded"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<channel, marker>>
   \/ /\ state[3] = "active"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![3] = "recorded"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<channel, marker>>
   \/ /\ state[4] = "active"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![4] = "recorded"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<channel, marker>>
   \/ /\ state[5] = "active"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![5] = "recorded"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<channel, marker>>
   \/ /\ state[6] = "active"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![6] = "recorded"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<channel, marker>>
   \/ /\ state[7] = "active"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![7] = "recorded"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<channel, marker>>
   \/ /\ state[8] = "active"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![8] = "recorded"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<channel, marker>>
   \/ /\ state[9] = "active"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![9] = "recorded"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<channel, marker>>
   \/ /\ state[10] = "active"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![10] = "recorded"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<channel, marker>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, marker>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token, msg

TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N
          /\ msg \in {"idle", "sent"}

Init == /\ token = 1
        /\ msg = "idle"

Next == 
    /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
    /\ msg' = IF token = N THEN "sent" ELSE msg

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, msg>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLES store


TypeOK == /\ Keys \subseteq 1..10
          /\ Values \subseteq 1..10
          /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]

Init == /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ k \in Keys
          /\ v \in Values
          /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
        \/ UNCHANGED store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PaxosSingleDecree ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N, M

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, ballot, value

TypeOK == /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: Nat]]
          /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: Nat, value: Nat]]
          /\ chosen \in Nat

Init == /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
        /\ proposers = [j \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
        /\ chosen = 0

Prepare(p) == /\ proposers[p].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot + 1
              /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, chosen>>

Promise(a, p) == /\ acceptors[a].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Accept(p, v) == /\ proposers[p].value' = v
                /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, chosen>>

Accepted(a, p) == /\ acceptors[a].value' = proposers[p].value
                  /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Choose(v) == /\ chosen' = v
             /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, proposers>>

Next == \/ \E p \in 1..M: Prepare(p)
        \/ \E a \in 1..N : \E p \in 1..M : Promise(a, p)
        \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E v \in 1..M : Accept(p, v)
        \/ \E a \in 1..N : \E p \in 1..M : Accepted(a, p)
        \/ \E v \in 1..M: Choose(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N, MAX_RETRIES
VARIABLES ackIndex, channel, chunkIndex, file, receiverState, retransmitCount, senderState


TypeOK == 
    senderState \in {"idle", "sending", "waiting_ack", "done"} /\
    receiverState \in {"idle", "receiving", "done"} /\
    file \in Seq(1..N) /\
    chunkIndex \in 0..Len(file) /\
    ackIndex \in 0..Len(file) /\
    retransmitCount \in 0..MAX_RETRIES /\
    channel \in {"sent", "lost", "ack_sent", "ack_lost"}

Init == 
    /\ senderState = "idle"
    /\ receiverState = "idle"
    /\ file = CHOOSE f \in Seq(1..N): TRUE
    /\ chunkIndex = 0
    /\ ackIndex = 0
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ channel = "sent"

SendChunk == 
    /\ senderState = "sending"
    /\ channel = CHOOSE c \in {"sent", "lost"}: TRUE
    /\ chunkIndex' = chunkIndex + 1
    /\ senderState' = IF channel = "sent" THEN "waiting_ack" ELSE "sending"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<receiverState, file, ackIndex, retransmitCount>>

ReceiveChunk == 
    /\ receiverState = "receiving"
    /\ channel = "sent"
    /\ ackIndex' = ackIndex + 1
    /\ receiverState' = IF ackIndex' = Len(file) THEN "done" ELSE "receiving"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<senderState, file, chunkIndex, retransmitCount>>

SendAck == 
    /\ senderState = "waiting_ack"
    /\ channel = CHOOSE c \in {"ack_sent", "ack_lost"}: TRUE
    /\ senderState' = IF channel = "ack_sent" THEN "sending" ELSE "waiting_ack"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<receiverState, file, chunkIndex, ackIndex, retransmitCount>>

IncrementRetransmit == 
    /\ senderState = "waiting_ack"
    /\ channel = "ack_lost"
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
    /\ senderState' = IF retransmitCount' < MAX_RETRIES THEN "sending" ELSE "done"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<receiverState, file, chunkIndex, ackIndex>>

Next == 
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ ReceiveChunk
    \/ SendAck
    \/ IncrementRetransmit

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<senderState, receiverState, file, chunkIndex, ackIndex, retransmitCount, channel>>

====

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N, M
VARIABLES data, txs


TypeOK == /\ txs \in 1..N
          /\ data \in 1..M

vars == <<data, txs>>

Init == /\ data = 1
        /\ txs = 1

Next == \/ txs' = txs + 1
        \/ txs' = txs

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N, epsilon

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

vars == <<clocks, offsets>>

TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
          /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Int]

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next ==
  /\ \E i \in 1..N:
       /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
       /\ offsets' = offsets
  \/ \E i \in 1..N:
       /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + 1]
       /\ clocks' = clocks

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N = 2

VARIABLES flag, turn

TypeOK == flag \in [0..1 -> BOOLEAN] /\ turn \in 0..1

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 0..1 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 0

Next ==
  \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![0] = TRUE]
      /\ turn' = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED turn
  \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
      /\ turn' = 0
      /\ UNCHANGED turn
  \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![0] = FALSE]
      /\ UNCHANGED turn
  \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
      /\ UNCHANGED turn
  \/ /\ flag' = [i \in 0..1 |-> FALSE]
      /\ UNCHANGED turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Nodes
VARIABLES infected


TypeOK == /\ N \in Nat
          /\ Nodes \subseteq 1..N
          /\ Nodes \in SUBSET 1..N

variables == << infected >>

Init == /\ infected \subseteq Nodes
        /\ infected \in SUBSET Nodes

Next == /\ \E node \in Nodes:
          /\ infected' = infected \cup {node}
          /\ UNCHANGED << infected >>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_variables

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PageAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N, Clients

Pages == 1..N

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == \/ \E p \in free:
            /\ free' = free \ {p}
            /\ UNCHANGED allocated
        \/ \E c \in Clients : \E p \in Pages :
            /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
            /\ free' = free

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS Topics, Subscribers
VARIABLES delivered, messages, subscriptions


TopicSet == Topics
SubscriberSet == Subscribers

Variables:
  subscriptions \in [SubscriberSet -> SUBSET TopicSet]
  messages \in [TopicSet -> Seq(Tuple("publisher") )]
  delivered \in [TopicSet -> [SubscriberSet -> Nat]]

TypeOK ==
  /\ subscriptions \in [SubscriberSet -> SUBSET TopicSet]
  /\ messages \in [TopicSet -> Seq(Tuple("publisher") )]
  /\ delivered \in [TopicSet -> [SubscriberSet -> Nat]]

Init ==
  /\ subscriptions = [s \in SubscriberSet |-> {}]
  /\ messages = [t \in TopicSet |-> <<>>]
  /\ delivered = [t \in TopicSet |-> [s \in SubscriberSet |-> 0]]

Subscribe(sub, topic) ==
  /\ sub \in SubscriberSet
  /\ topic \in TopicSet
  /\ topic \in subscriptions[sub]
  /\ subscriptions' = [subscriptions EXCEPT ![sub] = subscriptions[sub] \cup {topic}]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<messages, delivered>>

Unsubscribe(sub, topic) ==
  /\ sub \in SubscriberSet
  /\ topic \in TopicSet
  /\ topic \in subscriptions[sub]
  /\ subscriptions' = [subscriptions EXCEPT ![sub] = subscriptions[sub] \setminus {topic}]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<messages, delivered>>

Publish(pub, topic, content) ==
  /\ pub \in SubscriberSet
  /\ topic \in TopicSet
  /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![topic] = Append(messages[topic], [publisher |-> pub, subscriber |-> subscriptions[pub], content |-> content])]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<subscriptions, delivered>>

Deliver(topic) ==
  /\ topic \in TopicSet
  /\ delivered' = [delivered EXCEPT ![topic] = [s \in SubscriberSet |-> IF s \in subscriptions[topic] THEN Len(messages[topic]) ELSE delivered[topic][s]]]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<subscriptions, messages>>

Next ==
  \/ \E sub \in SubscriberSet : \E topic \in TopicSet : Subscribe(sub, topic)
  \/ \E sub \in SubscriberSet : \E topic \in TopicSet : Unsubscribe(sub, topic)
  \/ \E pub \in SubscriberSet : \E topic \in TopicSet : \E content \in Nat : Publish(pub, topic, content)
  \/ \E topic \in TopicSet: Deliver(topic)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscriptions, messages, delivered>>

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers

CONSTANTS P1, P2

VARIABLES turn, wants

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {P1, P2}
          /\ wants \in [P1 |-> BOOLEAN, P2 |-> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ turn = P1
        /\ wants = [P1 |-> FALSE, P2 |-> FALSE]

Next ==
  \/ /\ wants[P1] = FALSE
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P1] = TRUE]
      /\ UNCHANGED turn
  \/ /\ wants[P2] = FALSE
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P2] = TRUE]
      /\ UNCHANGED turn
  \/ /\ wants[P1] = TRUE
      /\ wants[P2] = TRUE
      /\ turn = P1
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P1] = FALSE]
      /\ turn' = P2
  \/ /\ wants[P1] = TRUE
      /\ wants[P2] = TRUE
      /\ turn = P2
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P2] = FALSE]
      /\ turn' = P1
  \/ /\ wants[P1] = TRUE
      /\ wants[P2] = FALSE
      /\ turn = P1
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P1] = FALSE]
      /\ UNCHANGED turn
  \/ /\ wants[P1] = FALSE
      /\ wants[P2] = TRUE
      /\ turn = P2
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P2] = FALSE]
      /\ UNCHANGED turn
  \/ /\ wants[P1] = TRUE
      /\ wants[P2] = TRUE
      /\ turn = P1
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P1] = FALSE]
      /\ turn' = P2
  \/ /\ wants[P1] = TRUE
      /\ wants[P2] = TRUE
      /\ turn = P2
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P2] = FALSE]
      /\ turn' = P1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Node
VARIABLES counts


TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
          /\ \A n \in Node: \A m \in Node: counts[n][m] \in Nat

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

Next ==
  \E n \in Node:
    /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>

====
